series_metadata.series_description: This form is completed by a highway worker or ODOT user of ODOT owned equipment. The user is responsible for inspecting all applicable items on the equipment and verifying this on the Daily Pre-Trip inspection form (EM-78).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 90 days, may be kept longer if needed in a HazMat situation. HazMat situations must be retained until released by Chief Legal., Paper: Recycle
